Hathaway, A professor of international law at Yale Law School and president-elect of the American Society of International Law, joins CBS News with more insight.

dailyNews.title: Even as They Praise Iran Cease-Fire, World Leaders Are Whipsawed by Trump

dailyNews.description: In his first news conference since being elevated to acting attorney general, Todd Blanche said that “nobody has any idea” what led to Pam Bondi’s dismissal other than President Trump.

dailyNews.title: ‘D.E.I.’ Was Erased From N.Y.C. Racial Equity Plan to Avoid Conflict With Trump
dailyNews.description: The changes came as President Trump has moved to erase diversity, equity and inclusion efforts. A Justice Department official still said the report seemed “fishy/illegal.”
